bullets: Complete Playset: This Nativity playset includes 17 colorful pieces and a mini storybook, providing everything needed for children to engage with the holiday story.
Interactive Learning: Designed to create excitement and wonder, this interactive set serves as a fun teaching tool for the Nativity story, suitable for repeated use.
Durable Construction: Made from durable plastic, the set is designed for children to play and reenact the Nativity Story without concern for damaging a special Nativity set.
Storybook Inclusion: A miniature storybook in English and Spanish is included, simplifying the process of teaching the Bible story of the birth of Baby Jesus Christ while children play

content.keywords: christian, bible, religious, toy, historical, figurines
content.description: Children bring the story of Jesus’ birth to life with this charming Nativity Set. The complete collection features a mini storybook describing the birth of Christ and 17 toy pieces ideal for little hands to play and learn

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
